title: rubus × intectus
intro: Rubus × interctus, also known as a hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). The plant contains various medicinal properties, including anthocyanins, ellagic acid, and salicylic acid, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × interctus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
